$description: Collection preset for coordinated programs (campaigns, care plans, enrollment drives, renewal programs). Deploy via collection_create, then customize properties for your domain.
definition: Coordinated execution units with their own rules, enrollment, metrics, and lifecycle. Each record is one program instance.

properties.description: Current lifecycle state. Only Active programs execute.
Who qualifies for enrollment. Natural language description of eligibility.
Program-specific rules that layer on top of org governance defaults.
Hard cap on actions per day for this program.
Sequence definition: steps, timing gaps, channels per step.
Responsible person or role for this program.
Total entities enrolled. Zero-cost counter via properties.
When this program was first activated.
